name: lsa
description: Living Spec Architecture — spec-first development methodology where specs are the permanent source of truth and every code/artifact change traces to a spec requirement. Nine skills: new (start feature), next (pick backlog item), discover (specify + discover), plan, verify, init, reconcile, revise-constitution. Main flow: discover → plan → implement → verify. Flow-aware (Quick/Standard/Extended) via core/flow-selector. Path-configurable via .lsa.yaml.
